// Generated by FrontComposer source generator (Story 2-2 Task 4bis / Decision D28+D38)
// Do not edit directly

#nullable enable

using System;
using System.Collections.Concurrent;
using System.Collections.Generic;
using System.Threading;
using System.Threading.Tasks;
using Fluxor;
using Hexalith.FrontComposer.Contracts.Rendering;
using Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection;
using Microsoft.Extensions.Logging;

namespace Counter.Domain;

/// <summary>Per-command Fluxor subscriber that records confirmed values into LastUsedValueProvider (Decision D28).</summary>
public sealed class IncrementCommandLastUsedSubscriber : IDisposable
{
    private readonly IActionSubscriber _subscriber;
    private readonly ILastUsedRecorder _recorder;
    private readonly ILogger<IncrementCommandLastUsedSubscriber>? _logger;
    private readonly TimeProvider _timeProvider;

    private readonly ConcurrentDictionary<string, PendingEntry> _pending = new();
    private readonly CancellationTokenSource _cts = new();

    private readonly record struct PendingEntry(Counter.Domain.IncrementCommand Command, DateTimeOffset CapturedAt);

    public IncrementCommandLastUsedSubscriber(IActionSubscriber subscriber, ILastUsedRecorder recorder, ILogger<IncrementCommandLastUsedSubscriber>? logger = null, TimeProvider? timeProvider = null)
    {
        _subscriber = subscriber;
        _recorder = recorder;
        _logger = logger;
        _timeProvider = timeProvider ?? TimeProvider.System;
        _subscriber.SubscribeToAction<IncrementCommandActions.SubmittedAction>(this, OnSubmitted);
        _subscriber.SubscribeToAction<IncrementCommandActions.ConfirmedAction>(this, OnConfirmed);
    }

    private void OnSubmitted(IncrementCommandActions.SubmittedAction action)
    {
        if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(action.CorrelationId)) { return; }
        PruneExpiredAndCap();
        _pending[action.CorrelationId!] = new PendingEntry(action.Command, _timeProvider.GetUtcNow());
    }

    private void OnConfirmed(IncrementCommandActions.ConfirmedAction action)
    {
        if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(action.CorrelationId)) { return; }
        if (_pending.TryRemove(action.CorrelationId!, out var entry))
        {
            _ = RecordConfirmedAsync(entry.Command);
        }
    }

    private async Task RecordConfirmedAsync(Counter.Domain.IncrementCommand command)
    {
        if (_cts.IsCancellationRequested) { return; }
        try
        {
            await _recorder.RecordAsync<Counter.Domain.IncrementCommand>(command, _cts.Token).ConfigureAwait(false);
        }
        catch (OperationCanceledException) when (_cts.IsCancellationRequested)
        {
            // Subscriber disposal during write — expected, don't log as error.
        }
        catch (Exception ex)
        {
            _logger?.LogError(ex, "Failed to persist LastUsed for {CommandType}", "Counter.Domain.IncrementCommand");
        }
    }

    private void PruneExpiredAndCap()
    {
        var threshold = _timeProvider.GetUtcNow().AddMinutes(-5);
        foreach (var kvp in _pending)
        {
            if (kvp.Value.CapturedAt < threshold)
            {
                _ = _pending.TryRemove(kvp.Key, out _);
            }
        }

        // Bound outer loop: at most _pending.Count iterations, each evicts one entry or breaks
        // (guards against concurrent-removal livelock — Story 2-2 code-review P27).
        int safety = _pending.Count + 1;
        while (_pending.Count >= 16 && safety-- > 0)
        {
            string? oldestKey = null;
            DateTimeOffset oldestAt = DateTimeOffset.MaxValue;
            foreach (var kvp in _pending)
            {
                if (kvp.Value.CapturedAt < oldestAt)
                {
                    oldestAt = kvp.Value.CapturedAt;
                    oldestKey = kvp.Key;
                }
            }

            if (oldestKey is null) break;
            if (!_pending.TryRemove(oldestKey, out _)) continue;
            _logger?.LogWarning("D38 cap reached: evicted pending {CommandType} CorrelationId={CorrelationId}", "Counter.Domain.IncrementCommand", oldestKey);
        }
    }

    public void Dispose()
    {
        _subscriber.UnsubscribeFromAllActions(this);
        try { _cts.Cancel(); } catch (ObjectDisposedException) { }
        _cts.Dispose();
    }
}

public static class IncrementCommandLastUsedSubscriberRegistration
{
    public static IServiceCollection AddIncrementCommandLastUsedSubscriber(this IServiceCollection services)
        => services.AddScoped<IncrementCommandLastUsedSubscriber>();
}
